summary: Iteration 122: Tested Quick Entry date handling fix and Menu Items dynamic category management. Both features are working correctly. Backend tests: 9/9 passed. Frontend tests: All critical flows verified.
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test categories (Grills, TEST_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quick Entry date fix and Menu Categories management both verified working. The getDateISO() function in POSPage.jsx (line 129-135) now preserves local date without UTC conversion. Categories API endpoints (/api/categories) support type=menu filter for menu categories.

quick_entry_date_fix.test_case: Sale with date 2026-03-09T23:45:00 is saved on 2026-03-09 (not shifted to 2026-03-08)
quick_entry_date_fix.details: The frontend getDateISO() function now preserves the selected date string directly instead of using .toISOString() which caused UTC conversion

quick_entry_regular_sale.test_case: Regular sale with cash amount 250.0 saved correctly
quick_entry_regular_sale.details: Sale created with multiple payment details (cash + bank) works

menu_categories_create.test_case: POST /api/categories with name and type=menu creates category
menu_categories_create.details: Custom category 'Grills' created and appeared in UI

menu_categories_ui_dialog.test_case: Manage Categories dialog opens and shows default + custom categories
menu_categories_ui_dialog.details: 5 default categories (Main Dishes, Appetizers, Beverages, Desserts, Sides) shown with 'Built-in' badges, custom categories shown with delete button

menu_categories_filter_dropdown.test_case: Category filter dropdown includes custom categories
menu_categories_filter_dropdown.details: Custom category 'Grills' appeared in the dropdown after creation

expense_date_handling.details: Expense date preserved correctly without timezone shift

ui_verification_screenshots.quick_entry_page: Quick Entry page loads with date picker, branch selector, sales/expenses tabs
ui_verification_screenshots.category_dialog: Manage Menu Categories dialog shows 5 default categories with Built-in badges + custom categories section
ui_verification_screenshots.category_filter: Category filter dropdown shows All Categories + all default + custom categories
